description:
Secure file server for Windows

CompleteFTP is a high performance Windows file server supporting secure file transfer via FTPS (FTP over SSL), SFTP (FTP over SSH), HTTP, HTTPS, SCP and SSH. CompleteFTP also supports web applications written in Javascript, and collaborative file sharing.
- Add support for TLS 1.3 session resumption.
- Add File-system adapter for SharePoint/OneDrive (Enterprise MFT).
- Add File-system adapter for Google Cloud Storage (Enterprise MFT).
- Add FileManager 4, a new web-based file manager that will serve as the stable, long-term foundation for the product UI going forward.
- Add native PGP support via JSS scripting API (Enterprise MFT).
- Add MCP Server for AI Assistant Integration, allowing AI assistants like Claude to manage the server directly. The MCP server exposes all CompleteFTP CLI commands as tools, plus built-in documentation lookup tools, over a stdio JSON-RPC 2.0 transport (Enterprise MFT).
- Add support for curve25519-sha256 kex (SSH/SFTP).
- Scan for weak SSH host and user keys when CompleteFTP Manager starts.
- Improve performance of reports.
- Enforce a minimum diffie-helman group size (2048 by default).
- Fix error generated when the OpenSSL 3.5 (or higher) client connects.
- Fix TLS handshake failure on Windows 2025 when client certificate validation is enabled.
- Fix intermittant RSA signing failure.
- Standardize and allow customization of file manager browser tab titles.
- Windows file/folder browser dialog: Add ability to paste or type a full path to navigate directly.
- Confirm the password for the private key used for CSR generation.
- Installer: Show version number in window title.
